known_gaps: External guideline artifacts are not cached or license-verified.
Clinical and safety review is incomplete.
Simulation set is below release coverage requirements.

history.abdominal_surgery.wording: 과거에 복부 수술이나 주요 시술을 받은 적이 있나요?

pain.frequency.wording: [필수] 최근 평가 대상 기간 동안 통증은 얼마나 자주 있었나요? 1 통증 없음, 2 통증이 있으나 매일은 아님, 3 매일 통증이 있음

pain.nrs_score.wording: [필수] 현재 통증을 0부터 10까지 숫자로 알려주세요. 0은 통증이 전혀 없음, 10은 상상할 수 있는 가장 심한 통증입니다.

pregnancy.possible.wording: 현재 임신 중이거나 임신 가능성이 있나요? 해당되지 않으면 그렇게 답해 주세요.

symptom.abdominal_pain.character.wording: 통증은 쥐어짜는 느낌, 찌르는 느낌, 타는 느낌, 묵직함 등 어떤 양상인가요?

symptom.abdominal_pain.location.wording: 배의 어느 부위가 아픈가요? 한 곳을 짚거나 여러 부위를 말씀해도 됩니다.

symptom.abdominal_pain.severity.wording: 현재 복통은 가벼움, 중간 정도, 참기 어려울 정도 중 어디에 가깝나요?

symptom.abdominal_pain.touch_tenderness.wording: 배를 가볍게 만졌을 때도 심하게 아픈가요?

symptom.bloody_or_black_stool.wording: 피가 섞인 변이나 검고 끈적한 변을 봤나요?

symptom.constipation.wording: 평소보다 변을 보기 어렵거나 변 횟수가 줄었나요?

symptom.early_satiety_or_appetite_loss.wording: 조금만 먹어도 금방 배부르거나 식욕이 줄었나요?

symptom.hematemesis.wording: 피를 토했거나 구토물이 커피 찌꺼기처럼 보였나요?

symptom.missed_period.wording: 해당되는 경우, 예정된 월경이 늦어졌거나 건너뛴 적이 있나요?

symptom.persistent_bloating.wording: 배가 자주 또는 계속 불러오거나 팽팽한 느낌이 있나요?

symptom.shoulder_tip_pain.wording: 어깨 끝부분에 새로 생긴 통증이 있나요?

symptom.unable_to_pass_stool_or_gas.wording: 대변과 방귀가 모두 전혀 나오지 않나요?

symptom.unintentional_weight_loss.wording: 최근 특별한 이유 없이 체중이 줄었나요?

symptom.urinary_symptoms.wording: 소변을 볼 때 아프거나 자주 마렵거나 소변 양이 달라졌나요?

symptom.vaginal_bleeding_or_discharge.wording: 해당되는 경우, 평소와 다른 질 출혈이나 분비물이 있나요?

elements.limitation: Clinical sex used for interview routing is not automatically equivalent to every USCDI sex-related element.

elements.data_element: Medication, Dose, Dose Unit, Indication and Dispense Status
Blood Pressure, Heart Rate, Respiratory Rate, Temperature and Pulse Oximetry
Laboratory Test, Result, Result Status and Specimen
Clinical Test and Result or Report
Patient Goals and Care Experience Preference
Encounter Type, Time, Location and Disposition
Care Team Member Identity, Role and Contact
Medication, Laboratory, Imaging and Clinical Test Orders
History and Physical or Progress Note

limitations: Coverage indicates candidate data-population capability, not US certification or conformance.
A mapped Fact does not make the data element clinically required for this encounter.
US-specific vocabularies and regulatory semantics do not replace Korean bindings or policy.

elements.display: Patient concern, goal and expected outcome
Pain presence and NRS score when pain applies
Patient, proxy or record information source

[필수] 현재 통증을 0부터 10까지 숫자로 알려주세요. 0은 통증이 전혀 없음, 10은 상상할 수 있는 가장 심한 통증입니다.

guideline_behavior.rationale: Interview behavior derived from guidelines may change with recommendations.

local_jurisdiction.rationale: Local pathways and administrative rules may change quickly.

safety_critical.rationale: Safety behavior and escalation knowledge require frequent monitoring.

stable_semantic.rationale: Atomic patient-reportable concepts are relatively stable but still require periodic review.

terminology_mapping.rationale: Terminology and interoperability baselines have independent releases.

clinical_guideline.rationale: Daily automated monitoring provides early detection for high-impact guideline changes; full review occurs only when change is detected or the review date is reached.

interoperability_standard.rationale: Versioned interoperability standards and domain datasets are monitored weekly; detected changes trigger mapping and Coverage review without changing clinical rules.

nice_guidance.rationale: NICE guidance is versioned and may be amended; weekly monitoring detects changes without implying weekly clinical re-review.

public_health_guidance.rationale: Public-health pages can change between formal releases; weekly monitoring is appropriate for the research package.

terminology_server.rationale: Terminology servers publish versioned content; monthly baseline monitoring balances stability and acquisition cost.

assertions: Sudden or severe abdominal pain and abdominal tenderness require immediate assessment.
Vomiting blood, bloody or black stool, inability to urinate, inability to pass stool or gas, breathing difficulty, chest pain, or collapse are emergency warning features.
Persistent or worsening pain, weight loss, pregnancy, urinary change, abnormal vaginal bleeding or discharge, persistent diarrhoea, and persistent bloating warrant timely clinical review.
artifacts.title: Stomach ache

assertions: Pregnancy-related abdominal or pelvic pain may occur with missed period, vaginal bleeding, dizziness, syncope, shoulder-tip pain, urinary symptoms, or gastrointestinal symptoms.
Pregnancy possibility should be considered in people of reproductive potential even when symptoms are non-specific.
Haemodynamic instability or significant concern about pain or bleeding requires direct emergency assessment.
artifacts.title: Ectopic pregnancy and miscarriage: diagnosis and initial management

assertions: Persistent or unexplained abdominal pain requires age- and feature-dependent safety netting and investigation consideration.
Weight loss, rectal bleeding, persistent distension, early satiety, appetite loss, and altered bowel habit can modify investigation or referral decisions.
The interview records these features without assigning a cancer diagnosis.
artifacts.title: Suspected cancer: recognition and referral — abdominal symptoms

assertions: Pain location, fever, recent surgery, and localized versus nonlocalized presentation affect downstream imaging consideration.
Questionnaire findings support clinician assessment but do not select or order imaging.
artifacts.title: ACR Appropriateness Criteria: Acute Nonlocalized Abdominal Pain

assertions: Finding site and Severity were present as allowed attributes for the abdominal pain focus concept.
The MRCM result validates terminology modeling only and does not determine clinical questions, priority, or safety.
artifacts.title: STOM SNOMED CT MRCM allowed attributes for abdominal pain
